description: Senior Project Manager with extensive experience in EPC/EPCM projects, including commissioning and system readiness activities in energy and industrial sectors.

projects.project: Medco DFO (Dayung Facility Optimization) Project, Grisik, Jambi
projects.client: PT. Medco Exploration and Production Grisik Ltd (MEPG)
projects.project_description: The Medco DFO (Dayung Facility Optimization) Project in Grisik, Jambi involves the Engineering, Procurement, Construction and Commissioning (EPCC) of facility optimizations to enhance production efficiency for PT. Medco Exploration and Production Grisik Ltd.
projects.responsibilities: Planned and coordinated commissioning phases, including system readiness and mechanical completion; Managed interfaces between construction, engineering, and operations teams; Ensured safety compliance during commissioning activities; Supervised functional testing and system handover processes; Oversaw documentation and handover dossiers preparation.

projects.project: CAP2 PROJECT (Carbon Disulfide (CS2) Adsorption Plant-2), Purwakarta, West Java
projects.project_description: The CAP2 Project focuses on the Engineering, Procurement, and Construction Management (EPCM) of a Carbon Disulfide (CS2) Adsorption Plant-2 located in Purwakarta, West Java, for PT. Lenzing South Pacific Viscose.
projects.responsibilities: Supervised commissioning planning and execution, including systemization and priority system testing; Coordinated vendor activities for equipment commissioning; Ensured compliance with safety protocols during start-up; Managed punch list close-out and system handover; Verified functional testing and operational readiness.

projects.project: Emily 1 Project Fuel Terminal and Jetty, Balikpapan
projects.project_description: The Emily 1 Project involved the Engineering, Procurement, Construction and Commissioning (EPCC) of a Fuel Terminal and Jetty facility in Balikpapan to support Exxon Mobil Ltd's logistics and distribution operations.
projects.responsibilities: Led commissioning planning and execution for the fuel terminal and jetty systems, ensuring mechanical completion, functional testing, and safe start-up. Coordinated system handover processes and managed subsystem readiness. Supervised interface management between construction, engineering, and operations teams. Ensured compliance with safety standards, including PTW and LOTO procedures during commissioning activities. Oversaw punch list management and close-out, ensuring documentation and handover dossiers were completed accurately.

projects.project: EPCIC Arung Nowera Gas Production Development Facilities
projects.project_description: This project involved the preparation and development of a comprehensive EPCC (Engineering, Procurement, Construction and Commissioning) proposal for the Arung Nowera Gas Production Development Facilities.
projects.responsibilities: Developed technical and commercial documents for EPCC proposal, emphasizing commissioning strategies and system readiness. Reviewed engineering designs and construction methods with a focus on commissioning feasibility. Coordinated bid development meetings to align proposal strategies with commissioning and operational requirements.

projects.project_description: Development of a comprehensive EPCC proposal for the Carbon Disulfide (CS2) Adsorption Plant (CAP2) for PT. South Pacific Viscose, focusing on technical feasibility and commercial viability.
projects.responsibilities: Coordinated technical and commercial aspects of the EPCC proposal, ensuring alignment with project specifications and feasibility requirements. Reviewed engineering designs and constructability methods to ensure readiness for execution. Managed bid preparation and ensured compliance with tender requirements.

projects.project: New Business Development - Power Plant Refurbishment and O&M Contract
projects.project_description: Strategic business development and proposal management for power plant refurbishment and Operation & Maintenance (O&M) contracts specifically targeting PLN and its subsidiaries.
projects.responsibilities: Managed proposal development for power plant refurbishment and O&M contracts, focusing on technical and operational readiness. Collaborated with engineering and operations teams to identify system improvement opportunities. Ensured alignment with client requirements and regulatory standards.

projects.project: Provision of Pre-FEED Services for In-Field Flowlines and Export Pipelines in PNG
projects.project_description: Management of Pre-Front End Engineering Design (Pre-FEED) services for midstream infrastructure, including flowlines and export pipelines in Papua New Guinea for Horizon Oil.
projects.responsibilities: Managed technical support for Pre-FEED engineering, ensuring system readiness considerations; Coordinated multi-discipline teams and field expertise; Reviewed constructability and logistics strategies with a focus on commissioning requirements; Conducted consortium and client meetings to align project deliverables; Prepared final project closing reports with emphasis on system handover documentation.

projects.project_description: Oversight of complex logistics and material management for the major expansion of the Tangguh LNG facility (Train 3) in West Papua, involving large-scale marine operations.
projects.responsibilities: Led logistics and material management execution with considerations for commissioning phase readiness; Prepared project-specific logistics plans and systems to support construction and commissioning; Set up Marshaling Yards at Cilegon and Gresik to streamline material flow for system readiness; Monitored logistics KPIs and ensured alignment with CSTS plans; Oversaw overseas and domestic shipments and customs processes critical for timely commissioning.

projects.role: Deputy Project Manager / Site Manager - TSC (Tripatra and Samsung Consortium)
projects.project_description: EPCC execution for the Senoro Gas Development Project as part of the Tripatra and Samsung Consortium, focusing on upstream gas processing facilities.
projects.responsibilities: Coordinated pre-commissioning and commissioning activities, including mechanical completion, flushing, cleaning, and functional testing of upstream gas processing systems. Managed system handover processes and ensured compliance with safety standards during commissioning. Supervised vendor coordination for package equipment commissioning and resolved technical issues during start-up phases. Oversaw punch list management and documentation for system readiness.

projects.project_description: The South Sumatra NGL Project involved the Engineering, Procurement, Construction and Commissioning (EPCC) of Natural Gas Liquid facilities to optimize resource extraction and processing for PT. Perta Samtan Gas.
projects.responsibilities: Led commissioning and pre-startup activities for Natural Gas Liquid facilities, including systemization, priority system planning, and functional testing. Coordinated multidisciplinary teams for system readiness and ensured compliance with safety protocols such as PTW and LOTO. Managed documentation and handover dossiers, including commissioning records and test reports.

projects.project: Tendering Resid Fluid Catalytic Cracking (RFCC) Project, RU 3 Cilacap
projects.project_description: Leadership of the EPCC proposal development for the Resid Fluid Catalytic Cracking (RFCC) unit at Pertamina's RU 3 Cilacap refinery, focusing on technical and contractual compliance.
projects.responsibilities: Coordinated cross-functional planning with engineering and operations teams to ensure system readiness; Reviewed and integrated technical specifications for pre-commissioning and commissioning phases; Supervised the development of the Preliminary Project Execution Plan (PPEP) with emphasis on commissioning planning and sequencing; Ensured compliance with safety standards and operational protocols.

projects.company: PT. ALSTOM POWER ENERGY SYSTEM INDONESIA
projects.role: Business Operation Manager / Deputy General Manager
projects.project_description: Strategic management of the Boiler and Environmental Service Business (BESB), overseeing tendering, field service groups, and business operation activities for power plant services.
projects.responsibilities: Directed field service operations for boiler systems, ensuring readiness for commissioning and start-up; Managed tendering and project execution with focus on system handover and operational compliance; Coordinated troubleshooting and issue resolution during service operations; Supervised documentation and reporting for commissioning activities.

projects.company: PT. ALSTOM POWER ENERGY SYSTEM INDONESIA
projects.project_description: Management of multiple contract activities covering the full lifecycle of power plant projects, including engineering, procurement, fabrication, and start-up phases.
projects.responsibilities: Executed commissioning and start-up activities for power plant systems, ensuring mechanical completion and system readiness; Coordinated subsystem handover and completion management; Supervised functional testing and troubleshooting during start-up; Managed vendor coordination for package equipment commissioning; Ensured compliance with safety protocols including PTW and LOTO during commissioning; Oversaw punch list management and close-out; Prepared documentation and handover dossiers including commissioning records.

projects.company: PT. ABB ALSTOM POWER ENERGY SYSTEM INDONESIA
projects.project_description: End-to-end project coordination for power sector contracts, ensuring technical and commercial alignment from the engineering phase through to final commissioning.
projects.responsibilities: Coordinated commissioning planning and sequencing for thermal power plant systems; Verified system readiness and functional testing; Managed interface between engineering, construction, and operations teams during commissioning; Supervised troubleshooting and issue resolution during start-up; Ensured compliance with safety standards and protocols; Delivered comprehensive commissioning documentation and handover dossiers.
